parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify((() => ({ text: $json.raw_text || ($json.message && ($json.message.text || $json.message.caption)) || '', source: { chat_id: $json.telegram_chat_id || ($json.message && $json.message.chat && $json.message.chat.id) || null, message_id: $json.telegram_message_id || ($json.message && $json.message.message_id) || null, user_id: $json.telegram_user_id || ($json.message && $json.message.from && $json.message.from.id) || null } }))()) }}
